'''鈭歯-m-k''' ('''namaka''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jive|jive]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-m-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jive|jive]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-m-k
|-
! Lemma
| namaka
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:namakithi|namakithi]] || [[word:namakiji|namakiji]] || [[word:namakishi|namakishi]] || [[word:namaki|namaki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:namakuthuth|namakuthuth]] || [[word:namakujuj|namakujuj]] || [[word:namakushush|namakushush]] || [[word:namak|namak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:namakuthu|namakuthu]] || [[word:namakuju|namakuju]] || [[word:namakushu|namakushu]] || [[word:namaku|namaku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:namakufuth|namakufuth]] || [[word:namakufuj|namakufuj]] || [[word:namakufush|namakufush]] || [[word:namakuf|namakuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:namakethe|namakethe]] || [[word:namakeje|namakeje]] || [[word:namakeshe|namakeshe]] || [[word:namake|namake]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:namakothoth|namakothoth]] || [[word:namakojoj|namakojoj]] || [[word:namakoshosh|namakoshosh]] || [[word:namak|namak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:namakotho|namakotho]] || [[word:namakojo|namakojo]] || [[word:namakosho|namakosho]] || [[word:namako|namako]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:namakofoth|namakofoth]] || [[word:namakofoj|namakofoj]] || [[word:namakofosh|namakofosh]] || [[word:namakof|namakof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:namak忙th忙|namak忙th忙]] || [[word:namak忙j忙|namak忙j忙]] || [[word:namak忙sh忙|namak忙sh忙]] || [[word:namak忙|namak忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:namakathath|namakathath]] || [[word:namakajaj|namakajaj]] || [[word:namakashash|namakashash]] || [[word:namak|namak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:namakatha|namakatha]] || [[word:namakaja|namakaja]] || [[word:namakasha|namakasha]] || [[word:namaka|namaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:namakafath|namakafath]] || [[word:namakafaj|namakafaj]] || [[word:namakafash|namakafash]] || [[word:namakaf|namakaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:namakasha|namakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gonamakasha|gonamakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokinamakasha|gokinamakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:namakn眉sha|namakn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gonamaknkn眉sha|gonamaknkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokinamakn眉sha|gokinamakn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:namaksh毛sha|namaksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonamaknksh毛sha|gonamaknksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinamaksh毛sha|gokinamaksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:namakrosha|namakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonamaknkrosha|gonamaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinamakrosha|gokinamakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:namakmusha|namakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gonamaknkmusha|gonamaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinamakmusha|gokinamakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:namaksherasha|namaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gonamaknksherasha|gonamaknksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokinamaksherasha|gokinamaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:namakngasha|namakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gonamaknkngasha|gonamaknkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokinamakngasha|gokinamakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:namakyasha|namakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gonamaknkyasha|gonamaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokinamakyasha|gokinamakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:namakyamasha|namakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gonamaknkyamasha|gonamaknkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokinamakyamasha|gokinamakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:namakn眉sh毛sha|namakn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonamaknkn眉sh毛sha|gonamaknkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinamakn眉sh毛sha|gokinamakn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:namakn眉rosha|namakn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonamaknkn眉rosha|gonamaknkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinamakn眉rosha|gokinamakn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:namakn眉musha|namakn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonamaknkn眉musha|gonamaknkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinamakn眉musha|gokinamakn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:namaksh毛n眉sha|namaksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonamaknksh毛n眉sha|gonamaknksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinamaksh毛n眉sha|gokinamaksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:namaksh毛rosha|namaksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonamaknksh毛rosha|gonamaknksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinamaksh毛rosha|gokinamaksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:namaksh毛musha|namaksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonamaknksh毛musha|gonamaknksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinamaksh毛musha|gokinamaksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:namakron眉sha|namakron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonamaknkron眉sha|gonamaknkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinamakron眉sha|gokinamakron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:namakrosh毛sha|namakrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonamaknkrosh毛sha|gonamaknkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinamakrosh毛sha|gokinamakrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:namakromusha|namakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonamaknkromusha|gonamaknkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinamakromusha|gokinamakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:namakmun眉sha|namakmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonamaknkmun眉sha|gonamaknkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinamakmun眉sha|gokinamakmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:namakmush毛sha|namakmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonamaknkmush毛sha|gonamaknkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinamakmush毛sha|gokinamakmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:namakmurosha|namakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonamaknkmurosha|gonamaknkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinamakmurosha|gokinamakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:namak|namak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n忙m忙k|n忙m忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:honamak|honamak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hon忙m忙k|hon忙m忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohonamak|hohonamak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohon忙m忙k|hohon忙m忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉namak|n眉namak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉n忙m忙k|n眉n忙m忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉namak|n眉n眉namak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉n忙m忙k|n眉n眉n忙m忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂namak|n茂namak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂n忙m忙k|n茂n忙m忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂namak|n茂n茂namak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂n忙m忙k|n茂n茂n忙m忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lunamak|lunamak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lun忙m忙k|lun忙m忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulunamak|lulunamak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulun忙m忙k|lulun忙m忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:linamak|linamak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lin忙m忙k|lin忙m忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilinamak|lilinamak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilin忙m忙k|lilin忙m忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:konamak|konamak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kon忙m忙k|kon忙m忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokonamak|kokonamak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokon忙m忙k|kokon忙m忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kenamak|kenamak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ken忙m忙k|ken忙m忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekenamak|kekenamak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keken忙m忙k|keken忙m忙k]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
